message:
✨ Improve NamespaceManager with caching and role options

- Add namespace caching to prevent refetch when filtering changes
- Add namespace-scoped cluster-admin role option for full namespace access
- Clarify that all roles are scoped to namespace only, not cluster-wide
- Update role dropdown descriptions to show permission levels
- Pass cluster to onCreated callback for targeted cache invalidation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
